previous_campaign_summary: Performance analytics dashboard, code-split framer-motion, admin search filters, offline booking, PWA notifications, WCAG a11y, user preferences, map UX, admin analytics, type safety cleanup, image optimization.
theme: Admin reporting & exports, i18n completion, customer dashboard, performance budgets, notification center

phases.objective: Complete i18n coverage for all remaining admin and UI keys
Customer dashboard enhancement: booking history, photo downloads, course progress
Performance budget enforcement with automated CI checks
Admin notification center: in-app notifications for bookings and system events
Photo gallery print-friendly page layout for printing photos
SEO improvements: dynamic sitemap for photo detail pages
Admin notification center with read/unread and toast notifications
Photo gallery lightbox improvements: slideshow mode and auto-play
Admin settings page: site configuration UI for admin
Complete i18n coverage for all remaining admin and UI keys
Performance budget enforcement with automated CI checks
Service worker caching strategy optimization for faster repeat visits
Final polish and bug fixes across the site
